activeSelectionBackground.$description: List/Tree background color for the selected item when the list/tree is active

activeSelectionForeground.$description: List/Tree foreground color for the selected item when the list/tree is active

inactiveSelectionBackground.$description: List/Tree background color for the selected item when the list/tree is inactive

inactiveSelectionForeground.$description: List/Tree foreground color for the selected item when the list/tree is inactive

focusBackground.$description: List/Tree background color for the focused item when the list/tree is active

focusForeground.$description: List/Tree foreground color for the focused item when the list/tree is active

hoverBackground.$description: List/Tree background when hovering over items using the mouse

hoverForeground.$description: List/Tree foreground when hovering over items using the mouse

dropBackground.$description: List/Tree drag and drop background when moving items around using the mouse

highlightForeground.$description: List/Tree foreground color of the match highlights when searching inside the list/tree

invalidItemForeground.$description: List/Tree foreground color for invalid items, for example an unresolved root in explorer

errorForeground.$description: Foreground color of list items containing errors

warningForeground.$description: Foreground color of list items containing warnings

background.$description: List/Tree Filter background color of typed text when searching inside the list/tree

outline.$description: List/Tree Filter Widget's outline color of typed text when searching inside the list/tree

noMatchesOutline.$description: List/Tree Filter Widget's outline color when no match is found of typed text

indentGuidesStroke.$description: Tree Widget's stroke color for indent guides

inactiveIndentGuidesStroke.$description: Tree stroke color for the indentation guides that are not active

tableColumnsBorder.$description: Tree stroke color for the indentation guides
